result.stdout:
Usage: 
dotnet licenses [<PROJECT | SOLUTION>] [OPTIONS]
dotnet licenses [COMMAND] [COMMAND_OPTIONS]

Collect and report all licenses used in a project or solution.

Arguments:
  <PROJECT | SOLUTION>  The project or solution to report licenses from.

Options:
  -o, --output <OUTPUT_PATH>      The output directory write files to.
  -of, --output-format <FORMAT>   The output formats to use to display package 
                                  licenses. []
  --silent                        Suppress output to console.
  -t, --template <TEMPLATE_PATH>  A liquid template file to use to display 
                                  package licenses when output-formats contain 
                                  "template".
  --open                          Open the generated file with the default 
                                  application.
  --version                       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  templates  Allows to list and export templates.

Run 'dotnet licenses [COMMAND] --help' for more information on a command.

Usage: 
dotnet licenses [<PROJECT | SOLUTION>] [OPTIONS]
dotnet licenses [COMMAND] [COMMAND_OPTIONS]

Collect and report all licenses used in a project or solution.

Arguments:
  <PROJECT | SOLUTION>  The project or solution to report licenses from.

Options:
  -o, --output <OUTPUT_PATH>      The output directory write files to.
  -of, --output-format <FORMAT>   The output formats to use to display package 
                                  licenses. []
  --silent                        Suppress output to console.
  -t, --template <TEMPLATE_PATH>  A liquid template file to use to display 
                                  package licenses when output-formats contain 
                                  "template".
  --open                          Open the generated file with the default 
                                  application.
  --version                       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  templates  Allows to list and export templates.

Run 'dotnet licenses [COMMAND] --help' for more information on a command.

result.stdout:
Usage: dotnet licenses templates [COMMAND] [COMMAND_OPTIONS] 

Allows to list and export templates.


Commands:
  export <html-list|html-table>  Export the specified template to file in order 
                                 to customize it.
  list <TEMPLATE_NAME>           Lists templates containing the specified 
                                 template name. If no name is specified, lists 
                                 all templates.

Run 'dotnet licenses [COMMAND] --help' for more information on a command.

commands.payload:
Usage: dotnet licenses templates [COMMAND] [COMMAND_OPTIONS] 

Allows to list and export templates.


Commands:
  export <html-list|html-table>  Export the specified template to file in order 
                                 to customize it.
  list <TEMPLATE_NAME>           Lists templates containing the specified 
                                 template name. If no name is specified, lists 
                                 all templates.

Run 'dotnet licenses [COMMAND] --help' for more information on a command.

result.stdout:
Usage: dotnet licenses templates export <TEMPLATE_NAME> [OPTIONS] 

Export the specified template to file in order to customize it.

Arguments:
  <html-list|html-table>  The name of the template to export.

Options:
  -f, --filename <FILE_PATH>  The file name to export the template to. If no 
                              name is specified, outputs to console.

commands.payload:
Usage: dotnet licenses templates export <TEMPLATE_NAME> [OPTIONS] 

Export the specified template to file in order to customize it.

Arguments:
  <html-list|html-table>  The name of the template to export.

Options:
  -f, --filename <FILE_PATH>  The file name to export the template to. If no 
                              name is specified, outputs to console.

result.stdout:
Usage: dotnet licenses templates list [<TEMPLATE_NAME>] [OPTIONS] 

Lists templates containing the specified template name. If no name is specified, lists all templates.

Arguments:
  <TEMPLATE_NAME>  If specified, only the templates matching the name will be 
                   shown.

Options:
  -t, --tag <tag>          Filters the templates based on the tag.
  --columns-all            Displays all columns in the output.
  --columns <author|tags>  Specifies the columns to display in the output.

Usage: dotnet licenses templates list [<TEMPLATE_NAME>] [OPTIONS] 

Lists templates containing the specified template name. If no name is specified, lists all templates.

Arguments:

                   shown.

Options:

  --columns-all            Displays all columns in the output.
  --columns <author|tags>  Specifies the columns to display in the output.
